flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at North Country Community College rose 12% between 2006 and 2009 ($4.0k → $4.5k).

flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at North Country Community College are 2% below 6-year earnings ($38.9k → $38.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at North Country Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (6.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at North Country Community College fell 32% between 2021 and 2024 ($13.7k → $9.4k).
